name: typescript-native-bridge
description: Build host for a tsgo-backed TypeScript fork: pins upstream `microsoft/TypeScript` and `microsoft/typescript-go` as submodules and materializes a small patch set on top — a tsgoChecker overlay on TypeScript plus a cgo bridge (bridge.dylib) on typescript-go. The built fork (`lib/typescript.js`) is a drop-in `typescript` whose type checker runs in-process on tsgo via the NAPI bridge.

scripts.setup: git submodule update --init && npm run build:js && npm run build:bridge && npm run build:ts
scripts.refresh: npm run patch:ts && npm run patch:tsgo && npm run check:lib
scripts.build:js: node tools/patch-tsgo.js && cd typescript-go/_packages/native-preview && npm install --no-save @types/node && npx tsc -b && cd ../../.. && node tools/sync-vendor-native-preview.js
scripts.build:lib: npm run patch:ts && cd typescript && npm run build:compiler && npx hereby lkg && cd .. && node tools/patch-lib-shims.js && node tools/sync-bundled-libs.js && npm run check:bundle-shape
scripts.build:ts: node tools/patch-typescript.js && cd typescript && npm install && npm run build:compiler && npx hereby lkg
